phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso ordinare un calice di vino rosso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh POS-soh or-dee-NAH-reh oon KAH-lee-cheh dee VEE-noh ROS-soh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Sì, si accomodi al bancone per ordinare.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÌ SEE ahch-koh-MOH-dee AHL bahn-KOH-neh PEHR ohr-dee-NAH-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, please sit at the counter to order.

responses.english: Yes, please sit at the counter to order.
responses.phonetic: SÌ SEE ahch-koh-MOH-dee AHL bahn-KOH-neh PEHR ohr-dee-NAH-reh
responses.local: Sì, si accomodi al bancone per ordinare.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa una bottiglia di Lambrusco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah OO-na bot-TEE-lyah dee Lam-BROO-skoh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the label, here.

responses.english: It is indicated on the label, here.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete assaggi di vini regionali disponibili, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh AS-sad-ji dee VEE-nee reh-joh-NAH-lee dee-spo-NEE-bee-lee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Depends on the season, not today.

responses.english: Depends on the season, not today.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il bagno per i clienti, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAN-yoh per ee KLYEN-tee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo al corridoio, a sinistra.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AHL kohr-ree-doh-EE-oh AH see-NEE-strah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AHL kohr-ree-doh-EE-oh AH see-NEE-strah
responses.local: In fondo al corridoio, a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete un vino consigliato per questo piatto?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh ah-VEH-teh oon VEE-noh kon-see-LYAH-toh pehr KWEH-stoh PYAH-toh

likely_response.local: Le consiglio il Lambrusco, si abbina perfettamente.
likely_response.pronunciation: LEH kohn-seej-LEE-oh EEL lahmb-ROO-skoh SEE ahb-BEE-nah pehr-feht-tah-MEHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: I recommend Lambrusco, it pairs perfectly.

responses.english: I recommend Lambrusco, it pairs perfectly.
responses.phonetic: LEH kohn-seej-LEE-oh EEL lahmb-ROO-skoh SEE ahb-BEE-nah pehr-feht-tah-MEHN-teh
responses.local: Le consiglio il Lambrusco, si abbina perfettamente.
